examples: it was the death of all his plans

meanings.definition: pass from physical life and lose all bodily attributes and functions necessary to sustain life
examples: The children perished in the fire
The old guy kicked the bucket at the age of 102

meanings.definition: suffer or face the pain of death
examples: Martyrs may die every day for their faith

meanings.definition: be brought to or as if to the point of death by an intense emotion such as embarrassment, amusement, or shame
examples: I was dying with embarrassment when my little lie was discovered
We almost died laughing during the show
The car died on the road
The bus we travelled in broke down on the way to town
The engine failed on the way to town
her eyesight went after the accident
She died to worldly things and eventually entered a monastery

meanings.definition: languish as with love or desire
cut or shape with a die
to be on base at the end of an inning, of a player
disappear or come to an end
examples: My secret will die with me!

meanings.definition: suffer spiritual death; be damned (in the religious sense)
examples: Whosoever..believes in me shall never die

meanings.definition: in or associated with the process of passing from life or ceasing to be

examples: anxious to see the new show at the museum
